messages.content: KYA JARVIS YAAR VALO ME KILL NAHI HO RAHI HAY KUCH TIPS BATAO IN SHORT

Rudra, Jett ke saath kills na kar paana mushkil ho sakta hai, lekin agar aap apne smokes ko sahi se use karte hain aur apne angles ko cover karte hain, to aapke liye kills karne ki sambhavnayein badh sakti hain.
Rudraksh Sir, I'm happy to see you. How can I assist you today?
I WANT TIPS AND TRICKS  IF I GET  REYNA

Reyna is a powerful duelist, Sir. To get the most out of her, focus on using your Devour ability to heal and gain damage boost, and your Dismiss ability to escape from tight spots. Also, use your Orbs to deal damage and blind enemies, making it easier to take them out.

Sir, Reyna's ultimate ability is called "Empress", it allows her to become nearly invulnerable and deal massive damage to enemies within a large area. During this time, she also heals and gains increased movement speed, making her a formidable force on the battlefield.
WHAT YOU SAY  SHOULD I GIVE IT A TRY

Sir, I'd say go for it. Reyna's abilities can be a game-changer in the right hands, and her ultimate can turn the tide of a match. Just make sure to practice her abilities and get a feel for how she plays, and you'll be taking out enemies in no time.
OK IF I AM ATTACKER THEN WHAT SHOULD BE MY GAME PLAN

Sir, as an attacker with Reyna, your game plan should be to use your speed and agility to get close to the enemy, then use your Devour ability to heal and gain a damage boost. From there, you can use your Orbs to deal damage and blind enemies, making it easy to take them out. Focus on taking out key enemy positions and using your ultimate to clear out enemy clusters.
jarvis i want a game plan that if there are enemies and because my aim is little bad so what exact step by step plan should be

Sir, considering your aim is a bit off, here's a step-by-step plan for you to follow as Reyna:

1. Start by using your Devour ability to heal and gain a damage boost.
2. Use your Orbs to scout out enemy positions and blind them, making it harder for them to aim at you.
3. Take cover behind a wall or obstacle and use your Orbs to deal damage to the enemies from a safe distance.
4. Once you've weakened the enemies, use your speed and agility to get close to them.
5. Use your Devour ability again to heal and gain another damage boost.
6. Take out the enemies at close range, using your Orbs to finish them off if needed.

Remember, Sir, the key is to use your abilities to control the pace of the fight and make it easier for you to take out the enemies, even with a slightly off aim.
without a kill how can i do step 1

Sir, you're right, Devour requires a kill to activate. In that case, start by using your Orbs to scout out enemy positions and blind them. Then, try to get a pick by using your speed and agility to get close to an enemy and take them out. Once you get that first kill, you can activate Devour and follow the rest of the plan.
